Info

Defines abstract interface for generator services.

class armpicom.service.iservice.IService[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract interface for generator service.

It defines:

methods:
execute - Executes a generator.
is_initialized - Checks if the service is initialized.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract execute(*, params: Mapping[str, Any]) → Mapping[str, Any][source]¶

Executes a generator.

Parameters:

params (<Mapping[str, Any]>) – Parameters for generator execution.

Returns:

The result of the generator execution.

Return type:

<Mapping[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if the service is initialized.

Returns:

True if the service is initialized, False otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
